description: Graph-based memory system for LLMs with knowledge graphs and semantic search.

cmd.description: Install the memograph package and expose its console scripts.
cmd.name: --from

name: io.github.Indhar01/memograph

environmentVariables.description: Path to your MemoGraph vault directory (created if missing).
environmentVariables.name: MEMOGRAPH_VAULT

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to block destructive MCP tools (delete_memory, update_memory, bulk_create, batch_delete, batch_update). Recommended for shared or untrusted clients.
environmentVariables.name: MEMOGRAPH_READONLY

environmentVariables.description: Optional LLM provider for query_with_context tool. Only needed if you want AI-generated answers.
environmentVariables.name: MEMOGRAPH_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: Optional LLM model name (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6'). Used together with MEMOGRAPH_PROVIDER.
environmentVariables.name: MEMOGRAPH_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: API key for Anthropic Claude. Required when MEMOGRAPH_PROVIDER=claude or when using the [anthropic] extra.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: API key for OpenAI. Required when using the [openai] extra (embeddings or LLM).
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Base URL for a local Ollama server (default http://localhost:11434). Only needed when MEMOGRAPH_PROVIDER=ollama or the [ollama] extra is installed.
environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_HOST

packageArguments.description: Console script that starts the MemoGraph MCP server (registered by pyproject.toml [project.scripts]).

runtimeArguments.description: Install the memograph package and expose its console scripts.
runtimeArguments.name: --from
